steps.title: Match evidence to claim
steps.content: The earlier idea is that fungal surface temperatures tend to be cooler than ambient temperatures. The experimental findings show colonies maintaining temperatures below their incubation temperatures, supporting that idea.

steps.title: Choose the confirmation word
steps.content: The matching word means to support or confirm with evidence. Choice A means make unclear, Choice C means summarize, and Choice D means reduce or cut short. The answer is B.
